scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/server && npm run typecheck -w apps/client
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/server && npm run test -w apps/client
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w apps/server && npm run test:coverage -w apps/client
scripts.docker:up: npm run docker:check-ports && docker compose up --build
